## Summary

-

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Scenario/showcase asset
- [ ] Packaging or project operations

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run maintain:check`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`
- [ ] `npm audit --omit=dev`

## Data Safety

- [ ] No real customer, operator, line, machine, route, production-plan, or private takt data is included.
- [ ] Any scenario, screenshot, diagram, or report asset is synthetic or intentionally sanitized.
- [ ] Public-facing examples use generic Process A/B/C naming.

## Notes
